title: Dimensional Doors Rift
description: Dimensional Doors Rift - for the Void's Rift Modpack
body:
Dimensional Doors for the Void's Rift Modpack

Doors that can lead you to anywhere. Tenebrae eyes beading upon you from Limbo.

Rifts form and sway, infect and consume, fight with your life and discover a new plane.

The adventure awaits, your life is at stake.
______________________________________________________________________________________

Removes quartz and diamonds as loot

Only lets you exit to the overworld instead of being placed in random dimensions like the Nether or Alfheim

Stopped doors from creating rifts and closing when entities and players enter the dungeon, this means you can enter dungeons with your friends

Fixed black fog and dark sky when a mob randomly enters a dimensional door and change limbo fog colour to better match the vibe

Makes monolith textures transparent
